guardrails: This artifact plans runtime-backed desktop flow repair; it does not implement missing FR behavior.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
W1.5.177 does not modify accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, runtime behavior, production renderer behavior, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.
Chat prompt text, model output text, raw URL query/hash, output directory, and other user-entered freeform text must not appear in runner output or visual evidence.
secure/** and cache/** remain untracked and must not be added to Git.
Sensitive artifacts follow the runtime_harness secure/local-token boundary and are not exposed through unsafe desktop evidence.

repair_track.objective: Replace local-only Chat Box, snapshot, and artifact surfaces with project/runtime-backed flows while preserving safe evidence contracts.
entry_criteria: Runtime command, snapshot, and artifact IPC boundaries are reviewed before implementation.
Chat evidence remains metadata-only and raw-draft-free.
planned_repair_steps: Route Chat Box submissions to runtime command handling without unsafe prompt persistence.
Bind Version Snapshot actions to runtime/Git snapshot operations.
Expose node artifacts in Task Drawer with project-scoped open/download behavior.
planned_verification: Targeted visual smoke for runtime-backed desktop flow after implementation

source_checklist_remaining_gap: Real chat command routing and runtime mutation are not implemented.

missing_before_implementation: Real chat command routing and runtime mutation are not implemented.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain missing.
runtime_flow_items.source_next_action: Route Chat Box submissions to runtime commands while preserving metadata-only smoke evidence.
planned_repair_steps: Define the desktop IPC command boundary before changing Chat Box behavior.
Route current-node and global workflow intents to runtime command handling.
Persist only project-scoped command metadata needed for history and verification.

implementation_sequence.reason: Chat Box already has metadata-only local evidence; runtime routing can be added without new dependencies if the safe evidence boundary is preserved.
Snapshot actions must follow the runtime/Git boundary before any restore or continue-execution UX is accepted.
Artifact actions depend on project-scoped runtime manifest and sensitive-content policy decisions being visible in Task Drawer evidence.
